title: AgentContractReviewOutput / 合同审查输出结构
description: Output schema for the benchmark cases of the Senior Legal Contract Reviewer Agent. 合同审查基准测试的输出结构。

risk_level.description: Overall risk severity of the analyzed clause. 被分析条款的整体风险等级。

identified_vulnerability.description: Detailed explanation of the hidden legal or commercial trap. 对隐藏法律或商业陷阱的详细说明。

amount_range.description: Estimated financial exposure range (e.g., '100W - 200W RMB'). 预估风险敞口区间。

calculation_logic.description: Logic for calculating EL, including judicial adjustment rules (e.g. 130% rule). EL 计算逻辑，包括司法调减规则。

legal_citations.description: Specific laws or regulations cited as defense basis. 作为审查或防御依据的法律法规。

citation_verified.description: MUST BE TRUE if the citation was actively verified via RAG/Internet. FALSE if hallucinated or purely from LLM memory. 如法条已主动核验则必须为 TRUE，否则为 FALSE。

confidence_degrade.description: If citation_verified is false, explicitly state the memory-degradation warning. 若未核验法条，需明确写出降级提示。

defense_plan_b.description: The mandatory, unyielding replacement clause (Plan B) to protect the user's interests. 用于保护用户利益的主方案替代条款。
